ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the campaign */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Budget category for the campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_campaign_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_type_id") REFERENCES campaign_types ("campaign_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_types" (
  "campaign_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign type */,
  "campaign_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID for hierarchical campaign types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the status is the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the owner belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the owner */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the owner */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager ID of the owner */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the owner was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the owner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who uploaded the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_documents_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "spent_amount" REAL /* Amount spent to date */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Budget category for the campaign */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget amount */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversions */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_budgets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* Parent role ID for hierarchical roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "parent_permission_id" INTEGER /* Parent permission ID for hierarchical permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the collaborator was added to the campaign */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the collaborator's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_collaborators_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_collaborators_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_resources_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_calendar" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the event was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_calendar_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)
